name: it-starts-with-the-egg
description: Rebecca Fett's 'It Starts with the Egg' — a science-backed guide to improving egg quality for fertility, preventing miscarriage, and optimizing IVF success. Covers the dangers of BPA and phthalates, evidence-based supplements (CoQ10, melatonin, myo-inositol, DHEA), and the egg quality diet.
useCase: Understanding egg quality and its impact on fertility, learning how environmental toxins affect reproductive health, choosing evidence-based supplements for IVF preparation, and implementing diet and lifestyle changes to improve egg quality.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical advice — consult a fertility specialist
Some recommendations may not apply to all individuals or conditions
Research is evolving — newer studies may update or contradict some findings
The author is a molecular biologist, not a medical doctor
